en: Feeling fear or anxiety; frightened.
To feel intense dislike or aversion for someone or something.
en_example: Because I love you, and my dad hates it.
zh_example: 因為我愛你，而我爸爸討厭這件事。
ja_example: あなたを愛しているから、そして父はそれを嫌っている。

en: Having little money or few possessions.
ja_example: 彼はあなたが貧しいと言っている。

en: A medium of exchange in the form of coins and banknotes.
en_example: He says you want my money.
ja_example: 彼はあなたが私のお金を欲しがっていると言っている。

en: A series of thoughts, images, or emotions occurring during sleep or aspirations for the future.
Having a friendly, generous, and considerate nature.
Sufficient in quantity or degree.
To bring up and care for a child until they are grown.
en_example: He has raised me since I was a child.
zh_example: 他從我小時候就養育我。
ja_example: 彼は私が子供の頃から育ててくれた。

en: To believe in the reliability, truth, or ability of someone or something.
ja_example: 貧しい人を決して信じるな。

en: To assure someone that one will definitely do something or that something will happen.
ja_example: 約束して、変わらないで。

en: A paid position of regular employment.
Tending to work with energy and commitment; diligent.
An intense feeling of deep affection.
ja_example: 私は彼女を愛している。

en: The existence of an individual human being or animal.
A medium of exchange in the form of coins and banknotes.
en_example: Life runs on money, not on love.
ja_example: 人生は愛ではなくお金で動いている。

en: A drink made from roasted and ground coffee beans.
en_example: Love cannot even buy a cup of coffee.
zh_example: 愛連一杯咖啡都買不到。
ja_example: 愛はコーヒー一杯も買えない。

en: Free of deceit; truthful and sincere.
en_example: He may be poor, but he is honest.
ja_example: 彼は貧しいかもしれないが、正直だ。

en: To move or travel from one place to another.
To remain in the same place.
To stop trying to do something; to quit.
To earn money through work or business.
To assure someone that one will definitely do something or that something will happen.
